meaning: 博伊西[美国爱达荷州首府]
examples: At the age of 74, he is still going strong as the oldest plumber in business in Boise, Idaho.
Similarly explosive growth occurred on the outskirts of Boise in Idaho, along Colorado’s front range and in southwest Utah.
Other cities in the top 10 included San Antonio, Texas, at No. 5, followed by Denver in Colorado, Austin, Texas, Boise in Idaho and Chicago.
Coming up, a refugee from Iraq settles into a new life in Boise, Idaho.
One out of every 21 Boise home owners lost or is losing their property.
